final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 小红书-style vertical cover image for a 素人 (everyday creator) media post featuring the 大疆 Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" 小红书 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 九宫格 (3×3 grid) layout arranged as a single vertical cover image
Subject: must include the 大疆 Pocket 4 as the featured product, prominently displayed
Scene/backdrop: needs a casual, everyday-creator atmosphere — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, approachable 素人 vibe — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, youthful direction fitting 小红书 aesthetics — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" as the central title (large, primary, cute and differentiated font style)
Constraints: must preserve 九宫格 grid structure visible across the full vertical cover; title centered
Avoid: overly polished commercial or studio look; avoid generic stock-photo feel
